name: ground-changes-in-real-environment
citations: friction: first verification query used wrong column names / wrong table, requiring schema lookup and rework
friction: initial edits were written to non-existent ubuntu host paths before realizing host had changed to windows
pattern: investigated real filesystem instead of guessing storage paths
pattern: verified data extraction against real Cowork sessions, not just 'runs without error'
pattern: correctly diagnosed typecheck failure as pre-existing repo config issue, not own change
